articles.title: I have not failed, I am fighting the system: Vinesh Phogat after Asian Games selection trials defeat
articles.description: Vinesh lost the semifinal 4-6 to Meenakshi Goyat, but reiterated her desire to represent India at the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.

articles.title: India's women wrestlers secure 100% podium finish at U17 Asian Championships with 10 medals
articles.description: India's women wrestlers secured a 100% podium finish at the U17 Asian Wrestling Championships 2026 in Vietnam, winning 10 medals, including gold for Diksha and Garima.

articles.title: It was never a fair fight but I am proud of myself: Vinesh
articles.description: Vinesh Phogat reflects on her challenging semifinal experience, expressing pride in her journey and determination to inspire others.

articles.title: Paris Saint-Germain v Arsenal: Champions League final ‚Äď live
articles.description: ‚öĹ Latest updates, 5pm BST (6pm local) kick-off in Budapest ‚öĹ Donald McRae‚Äôs Arsenal journey | Follow us on Bluesky In an ideal world, the Champions League final would always involve the two best sides in Europe. Knockout football doesn‚Äôt work like that, especially when multiple teams from the big five leagues are in the mix. There‚Äôs a decent argument that this is the first time since 2009 that Europe‚Äôs two best teams have met in the Champions League final. Paris Saint-Germain are the reigning champions; Arsenal are the champions of Europe‚Äôs best league* and unbeaten in this season‚Äôs Champions League. A Champions League final is always mouthwatering but this game has more saliva-producers than most. There‚Äôs a fascinating clash of styles, between PSG‚Äôs dizzying rotations and Arsenal‚Äôs unapologetic pragmatism, and a win for either team would have serious historical significance. Continue reading...

articles.title: Arne Slot to leave Liverpool after winning 20th league title
articles.description: Liverpool has announced that Arne Slot will step down as head coach after two years. He won the club's 20th league title in his first season and was LMA Manager of the Year. The club is now searching for his successor.

articles.title: Esports Nations Cup 2026: India's Chess, Rocket League teams named
articles.description: NODWIN Gaming has announced India's Rocket League roster for the ENC 2026 qualifiers. Grandmaster Nihal Sarin has also secured a direct qualification for the main chess event at the global nation-based esports competition in Riyadh.

articles.title: Rafael Jodar faces heat after viral video shows him pushing ball girl but did he actually do that?
articles.description: Rafael Jodar qualified for the fourth round of a Grand Slam for the first time in his short career but his third-round win made headlines for the wrong reasons after a video showed him pushing a ball girl.

articles.title: GT's Ahmedabad record: Gujarat's home dominance could decide IPL 2026 Final against RCB
articles.description: Gujarat Titans are banking on their formidable home record at the Narendra Modi Stadium for the IPL 2026 final against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. This Ahmedabad fortress has witnessed GT's rise, including their 2022 title win. Captain Shubman Gill thrives here, and the venue's conditions often favour GT's pace attack, potentially neutralising RCB's momentum.

articles.title: 5 Players Rajasthan Royals Can Release After IPL 2026
articles.description: Here's a look at five players Rajasthan Royals could part ways with after the ongoing IPL 2026 season.

articles.title: Serena Williams' former coach reacts strongly to Rafael JoŐĀdar's ball girl controversy at French Open
articles.description: A video from the 2026 French Open caused a stir online. It showed Spanish player Rafael JoŐĀdar near a ball girl who stumbled. Many thought JoŐĀdar pushed her. However, former Serena Williams coach Rennae Stubbs reviewed the footage. She stated JoŐĀdar did not touch the ball girl. This view is gaining traction among fans.

articles.title: Former IPL winner Subramaniam Badrinath backs CSK to go all in for Hardik Pandya, asks MI to trade THESE 2 players
articles.description: The 45-year-old stated that he would ask Chennai to trade all-rounder Shivam Dube and and top-order batter Ayush Mhatre for Pandya, if he was a part of MI's camp

articles.title: VPL T20 2026: NECO Master Blaster unveil new jersey and team anthem
articles.description: Defending champions NECO Master Blaster unveiled their new jersey and team anthem ahead of the VPL T20 2026. The launch signifies the franchise's readiness for their title defence with both men's and women's teams gearing up for the season.

articles.title: MPL T20: Gwalior Cheetahs unveil squad with IPL star Rajat Patidar
articles.description: Gwalior Cheetahs have announced their squad for the upcoming Madhya Pradesh League (MPL) T20 Scindia Cup, featuring IPL-winning captain Rajat Patidar. Owner Madhav Singhania expressed confidence in the team's balance of experience and talent.

articles.title: Ajit Agarkar Faces Strong Accusation Of 'IPL Bias', Ex-MI Star Vents Frustration
articles.description: File image of BCCI chairman of selectors Ajit Agarkar

articles.title: Mohsin Naqvi adds intrigue to ICC Board Meeting as cricket's power circle gathers in Ahmedabad during IPL final weekend
articles.description: PCB chairman Mohsin Naqvi will attend the ICC Annual Board Meeting in Ahmedabad virtually, skipping the in-person event on May 31.

articles.title: Ros Rivaz appointed to ICC board as an independent director
articles.description: Dr Ros Rivaz is set to join the ICC board on an initial three-year term, which can be extended for a maximum of one further three-year term

articles.title: Iran beats Gambia as federation seeks clarity over visas before FIFA World Cup 2026
articles.description: Iran is scheduled to play ‚ÄĆall its World Cup group matches in the USA ‚Ā†but the team‚Äôs participation in the tournament has been in question since the West Asian conflict in February.

articles.title: BFI clarifies SAI confusion over Asian Games squad
articles.description: The Boxing Federation of India has confirmed that boxers selected at recent trials in Patiala will represent the country at the Asian Games. This clarification comes after the Sports Authority of India raised concerns about the BFI's initial plans for further assessments post-Commonwealth Games, which conflicted with entry deadlines.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi can't stop his tears at IPL exit, but his season would be remembered for long
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi tried to hide his tears from the camera but he still got captured while being emotional after his team's exit from IPL 2026.

articles.title: SC allows Vinesh Phogat to participate in Asiad trials today
articles.description: The Supreme Court permitted Vinesh Phogat to compete in the 2026 Asian Games selection trials, while criticizing the Delhi High Court's handling of the case. However, the court questioned the wrestler for missing a mandatory doping test, emphasizing the importance of adhering to rules despite her significant contributions to Indian sports.

articles.title: IPL 2026 - Qualifier 2 - GT vs RR - Kumar Sangakkara disappointed with Sam Curran turning out for Surrey
articles.description: "We were told that Sam Curran had a season-ending injury," Kumar Sangakkara says after allrounder resumes playing at the Vitality Blast for Surrey

articles.title: 'Disappointing' - Sangakkara on Sam Curran turning out for Surrey with IPL still on
articles.description: "We were told that Sam Curran had a season-ending injury," Kumar Sangakkara says after allrounder resumes playing at the Vitality Blast for Surrey

articles.title: Teen Pooja Singh betters senior national high jump mark
articles.description: Haryana's Pooja Singh etched her name in history, becoming the first Indian to clinch the Asian junior women's high jump title with a remarkable 1.93m. This stellar performance shattered both the meet record and the 14-year-old senior national mark. Supported by Olympic Gold Quest, Pooja's victory also secures her a spot in the Commonwealth Games.

articles.title: Gujarat Titans Official Asked About Gill's T20I Axe, Approach. His Reply
articles.description: Shubman Gill stood like a rock for Gujarat Titans on Friday night, guiding them to a magnificent seven-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals in the IPL 2026 Qualifier 2.

articles.title: WFI reverses stand, allows Vinesh Phogat to compete in 53kg Asian Games trials
articles.description: Wrestler Vinesh Phogat was permitted to compete in the 53kg category at the Asian Games trials after the WFI reversed its earlier decision. This came after a dramatic weigh-in and intervention by WFI president Sanjay Singh, allowing Phogat to contend for a spot in the prestigious event.

articles.title: Into the deep: Athulya from Palakkad breaks into the male-dominated world of commercial diving
articles.description: Into the deep: Athulya from Palakkad breaks into the male-dominated world of commercial diving

articles.title: The statistical madness of Sooryavanshi's IPL 2026
articles.description: After offering glimpses of his immense talent in 2025, Sooryavanshi elevated his game to levels previously unseen in the IPL, let alone from a teenager

articles.title: Watch Vaibhav Sooryavanshi In Tears After Rajasthan Royals Exit From IPL 2026
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi got emotional and he was in tears after Rajasthan Royals' exit from IPL 2026. Gujarat Titans defeated RR to qualify for their 3rd IPL final.

articles.title: Playoff Hopes Dashed, Alarm Bells Now Ringing For 5 IPL Captains
articles.description: Out of the six teams that failed to make it to the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 playoffs, five teams face a huge question mark regarding one specific area - captaincy.

articles.title: "Apologise To Jaiswal": Manjrekar Tells Agarkar. Reason: Rohit Sharma
articles.description: Sanjay Manjrekar expressed bafflement over the continued backing of Rohit Sharma in the ODI squad and the BCCI selection committee's decision to drop Yashasvi Jaiswal from the setup.

articles.title: 'More than ready': Kumar Sangakkara backs Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for India call-up after dream IPL
articles.description: Kumar Sangakkara believes 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is ready for international cricket after a remarkable IPL campaign. The Rajasthan Royals opener amassed 776 runs in 16 innings at a blistering strike rate of 237.30, including one century and five fifties. The teenager could have had back-to-back centuries in the playoffs, but fell short on 97 and 96, respectively.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the superhero Bihar never had
articles.description: The beauty of having sporting heroes you can relate to is that they make greatness feel attainable, not aspirational

articles.title: Sooryavanshi Heartbroken, Breaks Down As Rajasthan Fail To Reach IPL Final
articles.description: Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was left heartbroken after his team failed to reach the IPL 2026 final.

articles.title: It takes a Gill masterpiece, steeped in orthodoxy, to overshadow another Sooryavanshi special
articles.description: Shubman Gill channelised his well-concealed angst beautifully. He would admit later that he was in the ‚Äėzone‚Äô, the intangible that simply can‚Äôt be explained.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi lost for words as Riyan Parag vents frustration after youngster misses century
articles.description: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag was involved in an animated conversation with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after the youngster missed yet another century.

articles.title: Egoless, circumspect, quick-learning Vaibhav Sooryavanshi shows the world he is more than ready for internationals
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi passed the Qualifier 2 test with flying colours on a tough night for Rajasthan Royals.

articles.title: Gunner Olszewski injury update: Giants WR carted off during OTAs; torn Achilles suspected
articles.description: Gunner Olszewski suffered a non-contact injury during New York Giants practice and was carted off after trainers treated him on the field.

articles.title: Who is Declan Rice‚Äôs girlfriend? Everything about Lauren Fryer while Arsenal star eyes 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Arsenal star midfielder Declan Rice has been with his girlfriend, Lauren Fryer, for over a decade now even as the two have continued to get trolled for their relationship in public for the last few years. While Lauren Fryer has remained pretty private about her life, Declan Rice has often defended her in public as he spoke about how she has changed his life for the better.

articles.title: RCB‚Äôs Road to IPL 2026 Final: Table-toppers, most consistent side and favourites to defend title
articles.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru are on the cusp of defending their IPL title after a dominant IPL 2026 campaign. Under captain Rajat Patidar, RCB finished top of the league and stormed into the final with a crushing win in Qualifier 1. They now face Gujarat Titans, looking like strong favourites to secure back-to-back championships.

articles.title: Over-ambitious Gukesh falls to Carlsen
articles.description: Gukesh lost to Carlsen in Round 4 of Norway Chess, highlighting the risks of over-ambition. Meanwhile, other matches saw mixed results in both sections.
